$comment: THEME = neon (80s–90s synthwave homage). Bright magenta brand, electric accents (cyan / purple / lime / magenta), SHARP controls (no border radius on buttons or cards), mono display for a retro-tech feel. Neon owns its neutrals per mode — light-lavender 'haze' in light, deep-purple 'synth' in dark (see tokens/overrides/neon.{light,dark}.json). Buttons don't lift; they GLOW on hover (a magenta box-shadow set in the overrides). Emitted under [data-theme='neon'].

primary.comment: bright magenta — fill (with black label, 6:1) and text.accent on dark

on-primary.comment: black label on the neon fill — 80s style, and the only thing that passes on bright magenta

shape.$comment: SHARP — no radius on buttons or cards (radius.none).

font.$comment: Mono display for a retro-terminal feel; body stays Fredoka.

interaction.$comment: No lift — button-lift = rest; the hover effect is a magenta GLOW set per mode in the overrides (shadow.button-lift).
